<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-māu]][[de:Holz-Hase]][[hak:Yet-mâu]][[ja:乙卯]][[ko:을묘]][[vi:Ất Mão]][[za:Ietmaux]][[zh-min-nan:It-báu]][[zh-yue:乙卯]][[zh:乙卯]]

'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following [[Yang Wood Tiger]] and preceding [[Yang Fire Dragon]]. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] [[Kinoto (乙)]] corresponds to Yin [[Wood (wuxing)|Wood (木)]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[Rabbit (zodiac)|Rabbit (卯)]] also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)]] combination.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 maau5
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-u
***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-u
***Kunyomi 3: Otsuboku-no-usagi
***Onyomi 1: itsumi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulmyo (을묘)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão

==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit==
Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit'''
|-
![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]]
|-
|
* [[55]]
* [[115]]
* [[175]]
* [[235]]
* [[295]]
* [[355]]
* [[415]]
* [[475]]
* [[535]]
* [[595]]
* [[655]]
* [[715]]
* [[775]]
* [[835]]
* [[895]]
* [[955]]
|
* [[1015]]
* [[1075]]
* [[1135]]
* [[1195]]
* [[1255]]
* [[1315]]
* [[1375]]
* [[1435]]
* [[1495]]
* [[1555]]
* [[1615]]
* [[1675]]
* [[1735]]
* [[1795]]
* [[1855]]
* [[1915]]
* [[1975]]
|
* [[2035]]
* [[2095]]
* [[2155]]
* 2215
* 2275
* 2335
* 2395
* [[2455]]
* [[2515]]
* [[2575]]
* 2635
* [[2695]]
* [[2755]]
* 2815
* 2875
* 2935
* 2995
|}

==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit==
In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] [[Mizunoto (癸)]] or [[Tsuchinoe (戊)]]), the [[February]] of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]], and in some cases, the [[Solar term]] (from [[Jingzhe]] to the day before [[Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.

==Days of Yin Wood Rabbit==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the [[Hassen]] cycle, excluding intervening days.
==See Also==
<!--Yin Wood Rabbit--><!--Yin Wood Rabbit-->

{{wikidata link|Q904791}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
